questions.question: What type of facility or venue is shown in the video?
questions.answer_key: An equestrian center or horse ranch with riding facilities
questions.rationale: Establishes setting context immediately; blind listener needs to understand location type early

questions.question: What animals are visible in the middle section of the video?
questions.answer_key: Two horses—one dark brown and one brown and white
questions.rationale: Main visual subject during high-need window; essential for understanding scene content

questions.question: What signage or branding appears throughout the video?
questions.answer_key: KOA logo appears in corner of frames
questions.rationale: Identifies video source; helps blind listener understand context and organization

questions.question: What structures or infrastructure are visible at the facility?
questions.answer_key: Wooden rail fencing, flagpoles, yellow directional markers, and covered structures
questions.rationale: Describes physical layout; helps blind listener visualize the equestrian facility environment

questions.question: What is happening in the final frames of the video?
questions.answer_key: A horse is shown in a wooded or forested area among trees and vegetation
questions.rationale: Transition to different location; shows facility includes natural trail or wooded areas
